<!--
Thanks for contributing to the AI Playbook!
Before opening this PR, please:
- Read CONTRIBUTING.md if this is your first contribution
- Make sure `npm run format:check` and `npm run lint` pass locally
- Keep this PR focused on a single concern
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullet points describing WHAT changes and WHY. Not HOW — the diff shows that. -->

-
-

## Type of change

<!-- Check the one that applies. Delete the rest. -->

- [ ] `feat` — New rule, command, skill, setup, or feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — No behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — Tooling, deps, config
- [ ] `ci` — CI configuration
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Scope

<!-- Which part of the playbook does this touch? Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] `.agents/rules/` — persistent rules
- [ ] `.agents/commands/` — slash commands
- [ ] `.agents/skills/` — on-demand skills
- [ ] `.agents/setups/` — multi-agent setups (specify which: )
- [ ] `cli/` — CLI tool
- [ ] Root docs (`README.md`, `CONCEPTS.md`, `COMMANDS.md`, etc.)
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Test plan

<!-- Concrete checklist a reviewer can walk through. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run format:check` and `npm run lint` locally, and both pass
- [ ] My PR is scoped to a single concern
- [ ] I updated relevant docs (`README.md`, `CONCEPTS.md`, setup READMEs) if structure or behavior
      changed
- [ ] If I added a new rule / command / skill / setup, I included a realistic usage example
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, credentials, or `.env` files

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456 -->
